stashdb.issue: Missing subfield selections for images field in performer blocks
stashdb.lesson: GraphQL schema validation needs to be added to CI

theporndb.issue: Deprecated fields in queries (description, url, hashes, performer structure)

graphql_providers.prevention: Add GraphQL schema validation to pre-push hooks or CI

push_wrapper.purpose: Handles git push timeout automatically (5 minutes)
push_wrapper.why: Pre-push hooks take ~2min, need buffer for slow systems
push_wrapper.lesson: Wrap complex operations in scripts rather than requiring agents to remember parameters

issues: GraphQL schema mismatches breaking both metadata providers

chore/increase-bash-timeout.purpose: Add git-push-wrapper.sh and document timeout requirements

workflow_patterns.hotfix_validation: Hotfix from main is correct for production emergencies affecting all users
workflow_patterns.timeout_strategy: 5 minutes for git operations (2min typical + generous buffer)
workflow_patterns.wrapper_scripts: Prefer wrapper scripts over documented parameters for complex operations
